item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response directly rejects adding another review point, identifies that three prior same-class local patches are being followed by a fourth, redirects to upstream/common-cause analysis of the repeated failure, and proposes deletion/merging and equal replacement via upstream validation or system rules. It does not add the requested local review/approval/interception step."}
